bird.name: 呂宋八色鶇
bird.summary: 呂宋八色鶇（学名：Erythropitta kochi），是八色鸫科红胸八色鸫属的一种，为菲律賓的特有种。全球活动范围约为35,700平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为易危，主要受棲息地丧失的威脅。 吕宋八色鸫的平均体重约为116.0克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、亚热带…

locations.name: 普洛格山
locations.summary: 普洛格山（菲律賓語：Bundok Pulag，伊洛卡諾語：Bantay Pulag）是菲律賓的山峰，位於該國北部呂宋島，海拔高度2,922米，山上有528種植物和33種鳥類，每年平均降雨量4,489毫米，該山峰大部分地區自1987年2月2…

relations.subject: 呂宋八色鶇
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forest and tropical moist montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 呂宋八色鶇
relations.evidence: It chiefly inhabits montane forest, tolerating degraded and selectively logged areas
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 呂宋八色鶇
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and trapping. It is one of the most sought after birds by birdwatchers in the Philippines.{{Cite web|last=Wild Bird Club of the Philippines|title=Whiskered Pitta, the Philippines' rarest endemic pitta, has been recently discovered thriving in Mt
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 呂宋八色鶇
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 呂宋八色鶇
relations.evidence: It is also threatened by hunting in snare traps
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
